tools.name: token_get_ohlcv_history
tools.description:
Use this when you need historical price candlestick data for any token. Returns OHLCV candles in JSON.

1. candles: array of candlestick objects with timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume
2. token: token identifier used
3. interval: candle interval (daily, 4h, 1h)
4. days: number of days of hist

tools.name: token_get_ohlcv_history
tools.description:
Use this when you need historical price candlestick data for any token. Returns OHLCV candles in JSON. POST variant of token_get_ohlcv_history -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. candles: array of candlestick objects with timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume
2. token

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: token_get_ohlcv_history · Private data: token_get_ohlcv_history, token_get_ohlcv_history · Public sink: token_get_ohlcv_history.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: token_get_ohlcv_history · Private data: token_get_ohlcv_history, token_get_ohlcv_history · Public sink: token_get_ohlcv_history

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

title: Tool description changed since last scan
detail: Tool "token_get_ohlcv_history" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash 0137f8cd)" → after: "Use this when you need historical price candlestick data for any token. Returns OHLCV candles in JSON. POST variant of token_get_ohlcv_history -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. candles: array of candlestick objects with timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume
2. token"

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
